columnMapping.gross_unit_price: PREÇO UNITÁRIO / P.VENDA / list unit price column
columnMapping.line_total_net: VALOR / Preço Total / line total column

structuredFieldInstructions.explicitNullLegacyRule: unit_price and total: leave null when gross_unit_price / line_total_net are populated
structuredFieldInstructions.discountedLinesRule: Populate gross_unit_price, discount_pct, and line_total_net from their separate columns

legacyFieldInstructions.escapeHatch: If no discount column → copy unit_price from unit price column instead of gross_unit_price
positiveExamplesUsingLegacy: Açúcar Branco → unit_price: 9.99, total: from VALOR
Hortelã → unit_price: from PREÇO UNITÁRIO, total: from VALOR
Aceto → unit_price and total: from their columns only
Tomilho/Manjericão → unit_price: from column, total: from column
structuredOnlyExample: POMODORI PELATI negative example → gross_unit_price/discount_pct/line_total_net populated, unit_price/total null

exampleBalance.ratio: Model sees 7× more legacy-pattern examples than structured-only pattern

contradictions.description: Prompt mandates structured columns but retains unit_price/total in JSON schema and provides explicit legacy fallback when discount column absent
POSITIVE EXAMPLES section still teaches unit_price/total extraction; only NEGATIVE EXAMPLES section shows structured-only for Pomodor
Rule 'When quantity is 1, unit_price usually equals line total' reinforces copying VALOR into unit_price — exactly the v22 Pomodor failure mode (22.05/22.05)
Pre-65452a9 prompt trained model on unit_price/total only; Phase 2 added fields to text but not to API schema or example corpus

userMessage.text: Extract each visible invoice line item. Copy quantity, gross_unit_price, discount_pct, and line_total_net from their labeled table columns.
userMessage.weight: Single sentence vs 6800-char system prompt with legacy examples

modelInstructionToOutputBoth.evidence: Prompt says leave unit_price/total null when structured populated — mutually exclusive paths, not both. Model chooses legacy path because it is easier and explicitly permitted.

interpretation: Model copies VALOR (22.05) into both unit_price and total
Triggered by qty=1 rule and legacy positive examples
Ignores structured column mapping despite Pomodor negative example
